reviews.comment:
Soy de Río Cuarto, tuve que realizar un viaje repentino a Posadas, Domingo por la tarde fui muy bien recibido solucionado inmediatamente mi problema de estacionamiento; consulté por lavado y lo hicieron durante la estadía. Excelente atención por personas muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
I'm from Río Cuarto, and I had to make a sudden trip to Posadas. On Sunday afternoon, I received a very warm welcome, and my parking problem was immediately resolved. I inquired about car washing, and they did it during my stay. Excellent service from very friendly people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaGJlVXhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar,la atención por parte del personal muchas veces deja que desear. Mucha cola para las cargas ya que los vecinos del país lindante vienen a cargar a nuestro país.
Los baños limpios pero solo se puede ocupar si se compra algo.
Muy buena ubicación céntrica.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place, but the staff's service often leaves something to be desired. There are long lines for loading because people from neighboring countries come here to load up.
The restrooms are clean, but you can only use them if you buy something. Excellent central location.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaFpqX0pnEAE
